youtube.title: This Pokemon Was ERASED From Existence By Nintendo - Pokemon Zero
youtube.description: Nintendo deleted this terrifying Pokemon from history and hoped we would never find it. Dataminers uncovered Pokemon Zero from Gold and Silver prototypes - a faceless creature that corrupted save files. Here is the disturbing truth they tried to hide. #Pokemon #NintendoSecrets #PokemonLore

tiktok.caption: Nintendo DELETED this Pokemon and hoped youd never find out about it... #Pokemon #PokemonFacts #Nintendo #GamingSecrets #PokemonLore

instagram.caption: This faceless Pokemon was so disturbing that Nintendo literally erased it from existence. Pokemon Zero corrupted save files and was scrubbed from Gold and Silver before release. They never wanted us to find this. #Pokemon #PokemonFacts #PokemonLore #Nintendo #GamingSecrets #DeletedPokemon #BetaPokemon #PokemonMystery #PokemonGold #PokemonSilver #Creepypasta #GamerLife
